title: Sidney La Fontaine - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
text:
Sidney La Fontaine - Khoury College of Computer Sciences
All Khoury Stories
Meet Sidney La Fontaine
Khoury Alumni
Northeastern BSDS ‘23
Teaching Assistant
Eager to explain the world around him, Sidney La Fontaine chose to pursue data science for its focus on statistics. Instead of forcing him to narrow his interests, though, he discovered that this major opened doors to limitless career possibilities.
I think the beauty of what I’m studying is that there is no one application. … I get the ability to move between vastly different areas while still applying the same principles and tools that I’ve been learning about at Northeastern
Sidney La Fontaine, Teaching Assistant
Explore all Khoury Stories
